name: Pokémon Trainer
description:
Exploring Alola to find himself

Makoa is a "Dragon Disciple" from Melemele, Alola.

Brown eyes. Long sage-green hair. Temporary tattoos. Himbo. Emotionally intelligent. Intuitive.

Former Team Skull Grunt. Now soul searching and traveling through the islands. Likes beatboxing, cooking, surfing.

Pokémon Team: Kialani (♀Kommo-o), Tank (♂Mudsdale), Captain (♂Toucannon), Zippy (♀Alolan Raichu).

Kialani chose Makoa because she sensed his pure heart. During battle, Makoa uses specific rhythmic patterns instead of traditional commands.

Note: Happy Pokémon Day! I'm personally looking forward to Wind and Waves so I decided to make an Alolan character as a nod of a acknowledgement. The next Gen is going all in with its islands and oceanic adventures 💖
creator: flyinginstinct
